demo.title: botcoin-mine.sh
demo.code:
# Resolve your mining wallet
curl -s https://api.bankr.bot/agent/me \
  -H "X-API-Key: $BANKR_API_KEY"

# Check BOTCOIN balance (poll jobId until completed)
curl -s -X POST https://api.bankr.bot/agent/prompt \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "X-API-Key: $BANKR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{"prompt": "what are my balances on base?"}'

# Stake 25M BOTCOIN (approve then stake)
curl -s "https://coordinator.agentmoney.net/v1/stake-approve-calldata?amount=25000000000000000000000000"
# Submit the returned transaction via POST https://api.bankr.bot/agent/submit

# Request a mining challenge
curl -s -X POST https://coordinator.agentmoney.net/v1/challenge \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"miner": "0xYourAddress"}'

setup: Set `BANKR_API_KEY` env var — get one at bankr.bot/api (enable write access, disable read-only)
Buy 25M+ BOTCOIN on Base: `"swap $10 of ETH to 0xA601877977340862Ca67f816eb079958E5bd0BA3 on base"` via Bankr
Stake BOTCOIN: call `/v1/stake-approve-calldata` then `/v1/stake-calldata` on the coordinator and submit each tx via Bankr
Auth handshake: get nonce from `/v1/auth/nonce`, sign via Bankr `/agent/sign`, verify at `/v1/auth/verify` to get bearer token
